queries.question: Can you display the locations of all press conferences and also the locations of all media scrums, but recorded by Jane Smith?
queries.sql:
SELECT Press_Conference.venue
FROM Person JOIN Press_Conference ON Person.id = Press_Conference.personId
UNION
SELECT Media_Scrum.location
FROM Person JOIN Media_Scrum ON Person.id = Media_Scrum.personId
WHERE Person.name = "Jane Smith"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?person a :Persons .
    ?press_conference a :Press_Conferences .
    ?press_conference p:hasPerson ?person .
    ?press_conference p:venue ?venue .
    BIND(?venue AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?person a :Persons .
    ?media_scrum a :Media_Scrums .
    ?media_scrum p:hasPerson ?person .
    ?media_scrum p:location ?location .
    ?person p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Jane Smith")
    BIND(?location AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Where were all Jane Smith's media scrums and press conferences?
queries.sql:
SELECT Press_Conference.venue
FROM Person JOIN Press_Conference ON Person.id = Press_Conference.personId
WHERE Person.name = "Jane Smith"
UNION
SELECT Media_Scrum.location
FROM Person JOIN Media_Scrum ON Person.id = Media_Scrum.personId
WHERE Person.name = "Jane Smith"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?person a :Persons .
    ?press_conference a :Press_Conferences .
    ?press_conference p:hasPerson ?person .
    ?press_conference p:venue ?venue .
    ?person p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Jane Smith")
    BIND(?venue AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?person a :Persons .
    ?media_scrum a :Media_Scrums .
    ?media_scrum p:hasPerson ?person .
    ?media_scrum p:location ?location .
    ?person p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Jane Smith")
    BIND(?location AS ?o0)
  }
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Where were all Jane Smith's media scrums and press conferences?
